title: Transgender persons have no legal right to collect badhai (customary gifts): Allahabad High Court
description: The Allahabad High Court has ruled that kinnars (transgender persons) have no legal right to collect badhai, the customary offerings or gifts which are given on auspicious occasions [Rekha Devi v State of UP]In a judgment delivered on April 15, a Division Bench of Justice Alok Mathur and Justice Amitabh Kumar Rai rejected a petition moved by a kinnar Rekha Devi for protection against alleged encroachment of her "territorial jurisdiction" by other kinnars.
